## What changed

Describe the user-facing result and the reason for this change.

## Validation

- [ ] I served the project over HTTP and tested the affected pages.
- [ ] I checked the browser console for errors.
- [ ] I tested keyboard interaction and a narrow/mobile layout.
- [ ] I added or updated documentation where needed.
- [ ] I did not include private data, credentials, or unrelated changes.

## Boundary-data checklist

Complete this section when the change includes geographic data.

- [ ] The direct source URL and retrieval date are documented.
- [ ] The exact license permits redistribution and derivative works.
- [ ] Required attribution is included.
- [ ] Transformations and identifier mappings are reproducible.
- [ ] Expected and generated feature counts were compared.
- [ ] DATA_LICENSES.md and ATTRIBUTION.md were updated.

## Screenshots

Attach before-and-after images for visible changes.
